PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\Koliasik\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; "devices:"; & $adb devices; "--- frame type counts \(full buffer\) ---"; $log = & $adb logcat -d -s CrsfUsbTest; "total tag lines: " + \($log | Measure-Object\).Count; foreach \($t in @\('TEMP\\\(CH\\\)','type=0x0d','RC_CHANNELS_PACKED','GPS','RPM','BATTERY','LINK_STATISTICS','RADIO_ID','unexpected payload','permission','Подключено','not found|не найден'\)\) { $c = \($log | Select-String -Pattern $t\).Count; "{0,-22} {1}" -f $t, $c })

PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\Koliasik\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; $log = & $adb logcat -d -s CrsfUsbTest; "total tag lines: " + \($log | Measure-Object\).Count; "--- counts ---"; foreach \($t in @\('TEMP\\\(CH\\\)','type=0x0d','LUA_CHANNELS','RC_CHANNELS_PACKED','GPS','RPM','BATTERY','LINK_STATISTICS','RADIO_ID','unexpected payload','CRC mismatch','Подключено','silence'\)\) { $c = \($log | Select-String -Pattern $t\).Count; "{0,-22} {1}" -f $t, $c }; "--- last 8 FRAME/LUA lines ---"; \($log | Select-String -Pattern "TEMP|LUA_CHANNELS|unexpected|CRC mismatch"\) | Select-Object -Last 8)

PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\Koliasik\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb logcat -c; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $log = & $adb logcat -d -s CrsfUsbTest; "window tag lines: " + \($log | Measure-Object\).Count; "--- counts \(5s window\) ---"; foreach \($t in @\('LUA_CHANNELS','GPS','RPM','BATTERY','LINK_STATISTICS','RADIO_ID','unexpected payload','CRC mismatch','unhandled frame'\)\) { $c = \($log | Select-String -Pattern $t\).Count; "{0,-20} {1}" -f $t, $c }; "--- sample telemetry lines ---"; \($log | Select-String -Pattern "GPS |RPM |BATTERY |LINK_STATISTICS "\) | Select-Object -First 6)

PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\Koliasik\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; if \(-not \(& $adb devices | Select-String "\\tdevice$"\)\) { $svc = \(& $adb mdns services 2>&1 | Select-String "_adb-tls-connect" | Select-Object -First 1\).ToString\(\); if \($svc -match "\(\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+:\\d+\)"\) { & $adb connect $matches[1] | Out-Null } }; & $adb logcat -c; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $log = & $adb logcat -d -s CrsfUsbTest; "window tag lines: " + \($log | Measure-Object\).Count; "--- counts \(5s window\) ---"; foreach \($t in @\('LUA_CHANNELS','GPS','RPM','BATTERY','LINK_STATISTICS','unhandled frame','unexpected payload','CRC mismatch'\)\) { $c = \($log | Select-String -Pattern $t\).Count; "{0,-20} {1}" -f $t, $c }; "--- sample telemetry ---"; \($log | Select-String -Pattern "GPS |RPM |BATTERY |LINK_STATISTICS |unhandled"\) | Select-Object -First 6)
